entries.reason: Agent-generated work must resolve into existing OFARM artifact/output/commit classes; generated-by-agent is provenance and authority context, not a truth category.
entries.negativeCase: AgentOutput used as hidden source of compliance facts.

entries.reason: OFARM already has Compliance Twin and Advisory Twin. World-model state belongs in Advisory-only runtime unless bridged through normal gates.
entries.negativeCase: AI Twin becomes hidden canonical state.

entries.reason: Current state is governed materialization. World-model state is advisory model state.
entries.negativeCase: Scenario prediction used directly in compliance submission.

entries.reason: Agent memory must be ephemeral scratch or persisted as governed OFARM artifact; it cannot be source truth.
entries.negativeCase: Assistant remembers field treatment and treats it as accepted operation evidence.

entries.reason: Pack activation is governance/context law and remains human-governed by default.
entries.negativeCase: Agent activates a buyer pack based on task prompt.

entries.reason: Attestation/signing and high-consequence compliance promotion remain human-governed by default.
Agent handoff may transfer task context, not authority. Receiving agent must recheck authority.
entries.negativeCase: Scouting agent hands operation authority to planning agent.

entries.reason: Public API success cannot waive authority, evidence, freshness, pack, query, or promotion gates.
entries.negativeCase: Operation endpoint returns 200 and UI labels output accepted.

entries.concept: Calculation/formula defaults as hidden agronomic law
entries.reason: Quantity/calc services can affect outcomes and need separate formula/vector review.
entries.negativeCase: AI applies default rate calculation as if accepted pack rule.

entries.concept: Minimum capture profile weakening evidence sufficiency
entries.reason: Minimum capture may help field UX but must not lower evidence sufficiency or attestation standards.
entries.negativeCase: Minimum photo metadata treated as enough evidence for regulated operation.
